overall.description: A first-person perspective of someone walking along a narrow dirt trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The path cuts through tall grassy fields with trees visible in the distance against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt trail through grassy field at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path at night, using a flashlight to illuminate the ground ahead and navigate through the darkness

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and gravel trail illuminated by the flashlight beam, showing stones and uneven terrain
tall wild grass and vegetation lining the left side of the path, swaying slightly
tall wild grass and vegetation lining the right side of the path
dark silhouettes of trees against the night sky at the path's vanishing point
white-barked tree trunk becoming visible on the left side as the camera advances

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail at night, the path illuminated by a flashlight that reveals gravel and stones underfoot. Tall grass lines both sides of the trail, while the dark silhouettes of trees loom ahead against the night sky. A white-barked birch tree becomes visible on the left as the walk progresses through the quiet, empty landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate dirt trail at night, transitioning from an open path into a more wooded environment. It begins with a flashlight illuminating the gravel and stones underfoot as the camera advances steadily through the darkness. As the walk progresses, the beam of light cuts through the tall grass lining both sides of the trail, revealing the looming silhouettes of distant trees against the night sky. The scene then shifts as the camera draws closer to the vegetation, finally bringing a white-barked birch tree into clear view on the left.
